title: Growth backend model v2
summary: 34a 계약 기준으로 planner_registered XP source, 첫/반복 XP 분리와 KST cap, non-XP activity ledger, level curve v2/grade, level_up priority notification, archive endpoint, backfill no-toast recompute를 backend model로 구현한다.
goal: 34c/34d UI보다 먼저, 성장/레벨링 v2 계약(XP policy v2, activity ledger, level curve v2, notification priority/archive)을 서버 단일 권한 모델로 안전하게 적립·조회할 수 있게 한다.

required_checks: pnpm vitest run tests/user-progress-xp-policy-v2.test.ts tests/user-progress-level-v2.test.ts tests/planner-registered-events.test.ts tests/user-growth-activity-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-archive-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-notification-priority.test.ts tests/user-progress-backfill-recompute.test.ts

pnpm vitest run tests/user-progress-events.test.ts tests/user-progress-level.test.ts tests/user-progress-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-source-action-smoke.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm vitest run tests/user-progress-xp-policy-v2.test.ts tests/user-progress-level-v2.test.ts tests/planner-registered-events.test.ts tests/user-growth-activity-events.test.ts tests/user-gamification-archive-route.test.ts tests/user-gamification-notification-priority.test.ts tests/user-progress-backfill-recompute.test.ts

notes: Stage 1 docs prepared on docs/34b-growth-backend-model. 34b consumes the merged 34a contract (v1.7.9 / v1.5.16 / v1.3.16 / v1.3.14 / v1.2.18) without changing it. Stage 2 backend implementation starts only after this docs PR merges and the internal 1.5 docs gate passes. Toast stack UI, MYPAGE profile integration, and badge/grade SVG/CSS assets are reserved for 34c/34d.
